description_en: Brisbane may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 46 halal restaurants and 5 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Brisbane, Australia, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Brisbane: 46+ halal restaurants, 5 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.5/5.
